seoTitle: Selwyn vs Seven Hills — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Selwyn and Seven Hills. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Selwyn vs Seven Hills: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Selwyn and Seven Hills.
heading: Selwyn vs Seven Hills — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Selwyn, Queensland and Seven Hills, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Selwyn has a lower overall climate risk score (25/100) compared to Seven Hills (30/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Selwyn or Seven Hills safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Selwyn has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Seven Hills scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Selwyn scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Seven Hills scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Selwyn or Seven Hills?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Selwyn has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
